who: real estate investors processing 5–15 property inspections/month
offer: For real estate investors processing 5–15 property inspections/month, inconsistent report generation causes delays in decision-making. We automate report creation instead of manual report writing using templates.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for real estate investors
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to real estate investors with demo video
Community forums where investors share tools
try_it: Let users try template-based report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
